evidence: "One of the best war movies - right up there with 'Where Eagles Dare'."
"Not as good as the earlier seasons. Spend a lot of episodes dealing with Remington's past instead of cases."
"If you are a Castle fan you will probably not be disappointed. They seem to have him come up with some pretty ridiculous solutions to the crimes too often..."
"This season has Gage & Sidney too - two excellent Martial Artists and great characters."
"Good old series. Stefanie Zimbalist and Pierce Brosnan are great together."
"Great series for those who like the older and cleaner ones."
"Great movie - clean enough for kids though intense at times."
"What can you say - it's Star Wars!"
"Not as good as the earlier seasons. Has one episode where we find out a character is gay too - has lost it's fun, corny innocence."
"An acquired taste but I like it - a bit risqué on occasion too so probably not for the kids."

summary: The user enjoys action and family-oriented films, often appreciating visual spectacle and fast pacing. They show a preference for straightforward narratives and have mixed feelings about production quality and emotional depth.
